title: Inherits From
text: Inherits From This property specifies the name of the development object from which the current object inherits. Depending on the context, it may be read-only or editable. Technical Name: TEMPLATENAME Expected Value: Name of the modeled object from which this derived object inherits. Default Value: None Description Derived objects can inherit from modeled objects, and subtype entities and fields can inherit from the their supertypes. If the property Inherits is True , the object is derived, and the Inherits From property specifies the URI of the modeled object. Applies To Component Component Entity Component Field Label Subtype Entity Subtype Field Related Links Inherits This property indicates whether the current object inherits from a modeled object.
